title: Boots! Boots!
writer: Jack Cottrell, George Formby, Arthur Mertz
actors: George Formby, Beryl Formby, Arthur Kingsley
plot: This George Formby film is packed with songs in the inimitable Formby fashion (including the controversial 'Little Ukulele') and guest appearances by his wife Beryl, this is essential viewing for all fans of Formby and British mus...
